evals.prompt: We need a new list page for `vendors` under the dashboard. It should show vendor name, contact email, phone, and branch. It needs a filter drawer with a search-by-name field and a branch filter. Use the expenses page as the closest reference.
evals.expected_output: Scopes the files that need to change (page, list-controls, data-table, query, types). Uses shared primitives: useFilterDrawer, FilterDrawerShell, FilterTriggerButton, AppliedFilterPills, DataTableContainer, TableScrollArea, SortableHeaderCell, computeStickySpecs. Prepends branch pill in buildAppliedFilterSummaryItems. Fetches data server-side via queries.ts. Produces handoff.
assertions: Uses `useFilterDrawer` hook — does not implement open/close state manually
Renders `<FilterDrawerShell>`, `<FilterTriggerButton>`, `<AppliedFilterPills>` — does not re-implement these
`buildAppliedFilterSummaryItems` prepends the branch pill as the first item
Data table uses `<DataTableContainer>` and `<TableScrollArea>`
Column definitions use `ColumnStickyDef` and `computeStickySpecs` is called
Page fetches data server-side via a function in `lib/dashboard/queries.ts` — no inline SQL in the page or component
Passes `selectedBranchName={context.selectedBranchName}` to the list controls
Produces a handoff with files changed, how to test, and any DB steps

evals.prompt: On the inventory list page, I want to add a delete button to each row. When clicked it should open a popup asking the user to type the word 'delete' to confirm before the button becomes active. On confirm it should call an API route that deletes the inventory item.
evals.expected_output: Adds a delete CTA to the row actions cell. Implements a dialog that disables the confirm button until the user types exactly 'delete'. Creates or extends a route handler under app/api/ that validates with Zod, authorizes via getCurrentUser(), branch-scopes the query, and returns { success, message }. Never leaks SQL errors.
assertions: Confirm button is disabled until `confirmText === 'delete'` (exact lowercase match)
Does not introduce a new dialog/modal library — uses existing patterns from `components/ui/`
Route handler exports `runtime = 'nodejs'`
Route handler calls `getCurrentUser()` for authorization
Route handler uses a parameterised DELETE query — no string interpolation of IDs
Route handler returns `{ success: boolean, message: string }` and catches DB errors without leaking SQL
Handoff notes whether a soft-delete or hard-delete was used and why

evals.prompt: On the customers list page, I want to add a filter for `customer_type` (it's an existing enum: individual, corporate). It should appear in the filter drawer as a select dropdown, show as an applied pill when active, and filter the query results.
evals.expected_output: Adds customer_type to the filter state type and parser. Adds a select input to the filter drawer. Adds the pill to buildAppliedFilterSummaryItems (after the branch pill). Adds a parameterised WHERE clause to the customers query in queries.ts. Does not touch unrelated files.
assertions: Filter state type in `lib/dashboard/*-page-filters.ts` is updated with `customer_type` field
A select/dropdown input for `customer_type` is added inside `<FilterDrawerShell>` in the list controls component
`buildAppliedFilterSummaryItems` includes a pill for `customer_type` when it is set — and the branch pill remains first
The WHERE clause in `lib/dashboard/queries.ts` is parameterised (uses `$N` placeholder), not string-interpolated
No files outside the scoped set are modified
Produces a handoff with files changed and how to test the filter
